adapters.name: sab-adapter-amazon-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Amazon S3 and S3 compatible cloud services.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-azure-blob
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Azure Blob Storage.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-backblaze-b2
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Backblaze B2 cloud storage.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-backblaze-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Backblaze S3 compatible API.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-cloudflare-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Cloudflare R2 S3 compatible API.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-cubbit-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Cubbit S3 compatible API.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-google-cloud
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with Google Cloud Storage.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-local
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with local file system storage.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-minio
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with MinIO object storage.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-minio-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with MinIO via S3 compatible API.

adapters.name: sab-adapter-s3
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with S3 compatible cloud services.

adapters.name: sab-storage
adapters.description: Provides an abstraction layer for interacting with a storage; the storage can be local or in the cloud.
